# Lalli Fafa

> AI-powered personalised children's stories in English and Hindi, featuring Lalli & Fafa — two best friends who make every child the hero of their own adventure.

Lalli Fafa is a web application that generates personalised storybooks for children aged 2–10. Parents enter their child's name and choose a theme (adventure, friendship, kindness, space, Indian mythology, etc.) and the platform creates a unique illustrated story with professional voice narration in English or Hindi. Stories feature two recurring characters — Lalli (age 6, curious and brave) and Fafa (age 3, imaginative and funny) — alongside the child as the third hero.

## Product

- Website: https://www.lallifafa.com
- Category: EdTech, Children's Media, AI-generated content
- Target audience: Families with children aged 2–10, primarily in India
- Languages supported: English, Hindi
- Platforms: Web (mobile-optimised), progressive web app

## Key features

- Personalised story generation using AI (text + illustrations + voice narration)
- English and Hindi narration with native-quality voices
- 10+ story themes: adventure, friendship, courage, kindness, bedtime, space, nature, Indian culture, mythology, animals, games, travel
- Story library where all generated stories are saved
- Share stories with family via WhatsApp, Facebook, or link
- Parental controls — safe, ad-free, no third-party data sharing with children
- Credits-based system: free plan (250 credits ≈ 4 stories), Magic Pass subscription (₹199/month, 1,000 credits/month)

## Characters

**Lalli** — A curious 6-year-old girl who loves exploring, drawing, and looking after her little brother. The leader of the duo.

**Fafa** — Lalli's 3-year-old brother who carries his stuffed bunny everywhere and sees magic in ordinary things. The heart of the duo.

The child using the platform becomes the "third hero" who joins Lalli and Fafa in every adventure.

## Pricing

- Free plan: 250 credits (≈ 4 illustrated stories), no credit card required
- Magic Pass: ₹199/month — 1,000 credits/month, Hindi narration, priority generation
- All payments via Razorpay (India's leading payment gateway)

## Company

- Founded: 2024
- Country: India
- Contact: contact@lallifafa.com
- Social: Instagram @lallifafa, Facebook /lallifafa

## Content policy

All stories are age-appropriate, culturally inclusive, and free from violence, advertising, and third-party data collection. Stories celebrate Indian culture, values, and multilingual identity.

## Pages

- / — Homepage with hero, characters, how it works, pricing overview, testimonials
- /stories — Story themes browser
- /pricing — Full pricing and plan comparison
- /blog — Articles on parenting, storytelling, early childhood development
- /learn — Learning outcomes and curriculum alignment
- /sign-up — Free registration
